description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set within a rectangular plot bordered by lush green trees and shrubbery. The structure features a flat roof and a modern, open-plan layout with multiple rooms visible from above, including what appears to be a living area, bedrooms, and utility spaces. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light and natural wood tones, complemented by large windows that allow ample natural light. The front yard includes a paved driveway and a small landscaped area with outdoor seating. The rear and sides of the property are enclosed by a wooden fence, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard surrounded by trees and fencing. The design features open-plan living spaces and a natural wood exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with trees and outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, flat roof, and the wooden fence enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional windows, and the continuation of the wooden fence and greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more of the side yard, trees, and the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large windows on multiple sides
